svg.title: SENTRY system architecture diagram
svg.desc: A structural diagram showing the five layers of the SENTRY cybersecurity training system: the employee and Android tablet app at the top, the Pepper robot layer, the FastAPI middleware, the AI and RAG engine, and the database and knowledge base at the bottom.

g.text: Kotlin · Retrofit · Jetpack Compose · ADB sideload to Pepper tablet
OWASP Top 10 · Computer Misuse Act · DPA

svg.text: Pepper tablet + laptop on same network
